posts.text:
I speak with Cameron Khansarinia, Chief of Staff to Reza Pahlavi -- the exiled son of Iran's last Shah -- about what could happen if the current regime falls and why the question of who comes next is so complicated.

Join The Chris Cuomo Project on YouTube for ad-free episodes, early releases, exclusive access to Chris, and more: piped.video/sQQqtmjYqCI

Video

See the game.


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

Just three months ago, Joe Kent laid out on Shawn Ryan’s show just how much of an enemy and threat Iran is.

Suddenly, when he gets to go on a bunch of podcasts, everything changes.

The grift is insane.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2034416127959281880#m

Not a loophole...the law. Citizen's United is the Plessy (separate but equal) scotus case of our time. It must change. @Scaramucci  is right.


Melanie D'Arrigo (@DarrigoMelanie)

The maximum an individual can legally donate to a candidate in an election is $3300.

Elon donated $277M to Trump in 2024 because of loopholes rich people use to buy elections.

If you care about election integrity — overturn Citizens United so our elections aren’t auctions.





— https://nitter.net/DarrigoMelanie/sta

What?


Citizens for Ethics (@CREWcrew)

Trump cabinet members have directed at least $30 million to Trump through political contributions, property visits, stock holdings, and donations. 

Who are they serving, Trump or the American people?
citizensforethics.org/report…




— https://nitter.net/CREWcrew/status/2034404732953846179#m

Why does the algorithm reward agit-prop? Why is that legal?


AG (@AGHamilton29)

Missed this…

Tucker says “you saw the Israelis blow up Qatar’s natural gas fields today”

It was an Islamic Republic missile attack. This is the 3rd or 4th time in a week where Tucker falsely blames Israel for an IRGC attack on a gulf state.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/AGHamilton29/status/2034597819147759793#m

Nope. Calculated. Went viral.


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

BREAKING: Cenk Uygur has an insane meltdown on Piers Morgan and begins screaming and cursing while veins pop out of his forehead.

Completely unhinged.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2034424475886748064#m

See the game


Nazi Hunters (@HuntersOfNazis)

Don Lemon tried to corner a New Yorker with loaded questions and cherry-picked framing to force a narrative on Iran.

It backfired... BADLY.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/HuntersOfNazis/status/2034456169901662675#m

Maga...why is this ok?


Tommy Vietor (@TVietor08)

Wow what a lucky break for Don jr!!!



— https://nitter.net/TVietor08/status/2034651068244893838#m

She does the same thing...this is rage bait...See. The. Game


AP (@Average_NY_Guy)

It's a US - Israel war, what's the issue?



— https://nitter.net/Average_NY_Guy/status/2034454465273557015#m

Sighhhh


ian bremmer (@ianbremmer)

biden total spend on ukraine: $180 billion

the pentagon just asked for $200 billion for war in iran.





— https://nitter.net/ianbremmer/status/2034587984079589459#m

Drain the swamp?


Citizens for Ethics (@CREWcrew)

Jared Kushner only has TWO days left to file his legally required public financial disclosure. 

The American people need transparency into his business interests if he's going to play such a big role in foreign policy. citizensforethics.org/legal-…




— https://nitter.net/CREWcrew/status/2034646153296310451#m

"Worth the risk to do the job"...can get real dicey real fast. Engel knows too...excellent conflict correspondent.


Richard Engel (@RichardEngel)

A reporter for Russian Today in South Lebanon.  Danger very close.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/RichardEngel/status/2034606247182311694#m
Want the truth about how the Iranian people feel about getting bombed…?… But the real chance is to get rid of this regime? Here it is:  piped.video/sQQqtmjYqCI

Now do why you said iraq had WMD the last time a republican prez said we had to go to war


Ari Fleischer (@AriFleischer)

This is CNN.
